commit.message:
Rename package from com.notification to org.notification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Grafana dashboard by setting datasource UID and enabling histogram metrics

Dashboard panels referenced datasource uid "prometheus" but the
provisioned datasource had no explicit UID. Also enabled percentiles
histogram for HTTP server requests so p95/p99 latency panels have data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Redis cache serialization by using JSON instead of JDK serializer

The default JdkSerializationRedisSerializer requires cached objects to
implement Serializable. Entity classes (User, Device, NotificationTemplate)
don't, causing every @Cacheable call to fail with SerializationException
and resulting in 100% load test failures. Switch to
GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer. Also promote load-client error
logging from DEBUG to ERROR for better visibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace wildcard imports with explicit single-class imports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add healthcheck to notification-server for load-client readiness

The load-client was starting before the notification-server Spring Boot
app was ready, causing 100% request failures. Use actuator health
endpoint as healthcheck and require service_healthy condition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Docker build by generating per-service settings.gradle

Each Dockerfile was copying the shared settings.gradle which references
all subprojects, but only one subproject's source was available during
build. Generate a minimal settings.gradle with only the target subproject.

perf: LLM成本优化 v2.0 — 批量生成+精简Prompt+JSON鲁棒解析

成本优化效果：
- 抖音：4种类型→1次API调用（减少75%调用次数）
- 小红书：4种类型→2次API调用（2+2分组避免截断）
- 精简Prompt：输入token从~500压缩到~180（节省64%）
- 每月预计费用从 ¥2.04 降至 ¥0.45，节省78%

JSON鲁棒性修复：
- 多重解析策略（直接/修复/提取数组/提取对象/截断修复）
- _fix_common_json_errors：修复hashtag缺引号、末尾逗号、body换行符
- 小红书body字段：Prompt明确要求不含换行符

commit.message:
fix: enrichment pipeline - language-aware lookups and missing template

Three issues fixed:

1. Enhancement prompt now explicitly says REPLACE term* with marker
   (AI was appending marker after original text instead of replacing)

2. Wikipedia lookups now try the note's language first (e.g. nl.wikipedia.org
   for Dutch notes) before falling back to English Wikipedia

3. Created missing prompts/enrichment.blade.php template - the LLM fallback
   was calling view('prompts.enrichment') which didn't exist, causing every
   non-Wikipedia term to return "Definition unavailable"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix health check connection flooding on Windows

The health poll fired a new HTTP request every 500ms with a 2s timeout,
creating 4+ concurrent connections. On Windows, Defender's localhost
traffic inspection delayed responses past the timeout, causing
ECONNRESET cascades — the response callback never fired despite the
backend returning 200 OK.

Fix: sequential polling (one request at a time, wait for completion
before starting next) + 10s per-request timeout + res.resume() to
drain response bodies. Also adds isQuitting guard to prevent
re-entrant before-quit shutdown loop.

Stage5鬼AI修正: 階段巡回の完全化+地上巡回の活性化

1. フラグ解除を2段階に: 上層到達→地上帰還で解除（完全巡回保証）

2. タイマー短縮: 50秒→25秒、クールダウン50秒→25秒（活発な巡回サイクル）

3. WPリセット廃止: 自然な順番で継続（stairwell→次→地上へ自然ループ）

4. canGuard範囲拡大: Stage5で12m→30m（広大マップ全体を巡回可能に）

commit.message:
Implement View Controller pattern for flexible site visualization

Add Grid and Board view switching capability to Sites page, enabling users to view the same study data in multiple layouts without refetching.

Components added:
- ViewSwitcher: Toggle between Grid/Board/Timeline views with localStorage persistence
- GridView: Sortable table view with click-to-sort headers (site, country, severity, risk, days)
- BoardView: Kanban-style lifecycle view with 4 columns (Regulatory → Contract → Activation → Activated)
- SitesViewController: Manages view state and data fetching, passes data to selected view

Integration:
- Replaced hardcoded sites table in Study Detail page with SitesViewController
- Removed handleKeyPress utility (now in GridView)
- View preference persists across sessions using localStorage

Architecture:
- Single data source (GET /studies/:id/latest)
- View switching does not trigger new API calls
- Template-agnostic design: same siteSnapshots data powers both views

This implements the View Controller pattern specified in the implementation plan, providing Grid + Board views that cover 90% of CPM workflows.

commit.message:
add Claude Code project skills for implementation phase

.claude/skills/tdd-workflow.md:
  Enforces Red-Green-Refactor cycle per ADR-007. Steps: write failing
  test first, minimum implementation to pass, refactor, confirm done.
  Includes layer assignment reminder (Vitest vs Playwright) and done checklist.

.claude/skills/react-component.md:
  Scaffolds src/components/<Name>/<Name>.tsx + .css following ADR-001/005.
  Functional components, no class components, no inline styles, token-only
  CSS values, no state management libraries, no barrel files.

.claude/skills/web-audio-patterns.md:
  Correct Web Audio API usage patterns for: file decode, Float32Array
  worker transfer (AudioBuffer is not transferable), looped playback,
  real-time loopStart/loopEnd update during drag, playhead position via
  AudioContext.currentTime, autoplay policy for Playwright, common mistakes.

CLAUDE.md: added skills reference table

Based on community research: skills keep CLAUDE.md lean (<200 lines),
are loaded on demand, and enforce repeatable workflows more reliably
than prose instructions in CLAUDE.md alone.

commit.message:
fix: 将地图数据嵌入JavaScript文件，解决file://协议CORS限制

## 问题
- 直接用浏览器打开 HTML 文件（file://协议）
- fetch API 被 CORS 策略阻止
- 控制台错误：Access to fetch at 'file:///...' has been blocked by CORS policy
- 地图数据无法加载，地图功能完全不可用

## 解决方案
- 将 GeoJSON 数据转换为 JavaScript 变量（chinaGeoJSON）
- 直接嵌入到 china-data.js 文件中（583KB）
- 移除 fetch API 调用，直接使用变量
- 添加依赖等待机制（等待 echarts 和 chinaGeoJSON 都加载完成）
- 简化 china-map.js 逻辑

## 技术优势
- ✅ 完全不依赖网络请求
- ✅ 支持 file:// 协议直接打开
- ✅ 无 CORS 限制
- ✅ 加载速度更快（无需异步请求）
- ✅ 代码更简洁

## 文件变更
- 新增：js/lib/china-data.js（583KB，包含完整地图数据）
- 修改：js/lib/china-map.js（简化为直接注册）
- 修改：index.html（添加 china-data.js 引用）
- 删除：js/lib/china.js、js/lib/china.json（不再需要）

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

[#187] fix(deploy): run alembic migrations in FastAPI lifespan on startup (#193)

The Coolify start_command was not being applied to the generated
docker-compose.yaml, so the app started via the Dockerfile CMD (uvicorn
only, no alembic). All DB operations failed: relation 'users' does not exist.

Fix: move alembic upgrade head into the FastAPI lifespan context manager
using asyncio.to_thread(). Migrations now run on every startup regardless
of how the container is launched. Also add --proxy-headers to Dockerfile CMD
so uvicorn reads X-Forwarded-Proto from Traefik correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

security(workflows): comprehensive hardening of reusable CI/CD workflows

Wave 1 — Security & correctness:
- Move all ${{ inputs.* }} and ${{ secrets.* }} to env: vars (fixes command injection)
- Add input validation (path traversal, numeric build numbers, bump-type, tag-prefix)
- Remove all || true on test steps and altool upload (CI now fails on real failures)
- Add set -o pipefail for all xcodebuild | xcpretty pipes
- Build JSON payloads via python3 (fixes JSON injection in Supabase logging)

Wave 2 — Supply chain & concurrency:
- Pin all actions to commit SHAs (checkout, cache, upload-artifact, setup-xcode, swiftlint)
- Add concurrency groups to testflight and version-bump workflows
- Fix CI concurrency group to include github.repository (prevents cross-repo cancellation)
- Scope SPM cache keys to github.repository + xcode-version
- Add Dependabot config for weekly action SHA updates

Wave 3 — Self-hosted safety & cost:
- Make keychain and private_keys paths run-unique (prevents collision on self-hosted)
- Make archive paths run-unique
- Move version-bump to ubuntu-latest (10x cost savings, no Xcode needed)
- Scope git add to specific files instead of git add -A
- Add duplicate-tag guard in version-bump
- Clean up secrets (keychain + API key files) in always() step

Wave 4 — DX & documentation:
- Add scheme detection assertion (fails loudly instead of silent no-op)
- Add runner input to all workflows for macOS version flexibility
- Add team-id input to testflight (removes hard-coded value)
- Add workflow outputs (build-number, version)
- Add xcodegen .xcodeproj existence guard to testflight
- Use python3 for safe JSON construction in Supabase logging
- Log actual job.status instead of hard-coded "uploaded"
- Add README with full usage docs, input tables, and secret setup guide
- Reduce testflight timeout from 45 to 30 minutes
- Add retention-days: 7 to test artifacts
- Improve step summary to include job status

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
